T0363.title: Rebate Fee / Turnover Fee
T0363.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“洗码费/流水费”指赌场或平台按赌客下注流水抽取一定比例后返给代理或跑分人员的佣金。
T0363.description: This fee is essentially a cut of the circulating gambling funds. Casinos deduct it from the total turnover and distribute it to intermediaries, code merchants, or money laundering teams to incentivize continuous recruitment of gamblers and maintenance of financial channels. In scams combining telecom fraud and money laundering, this fee is often disguised as a "handling fee" or "rebate," but it actually serves as a lubricant for the money laundering chain, significantly diluting the gambler's principal through successive deductions.
T0363.usageExample: Recruiting for manual money laundering tasks, base salary plus bonuses and an extra three points, minus a 20% turnover commission.
